description: Use when wiring an automatic behavior to a Claude Code event (typecheck after edit, block commit on test fail, notify on long completion), editing settings.json (global or project), troubleshooting why a hook didn't fire, deciding between hook / CLAUDE.md / skill for "from now on, when X, do Y", or setting up the starter automation set for a new machine. Routes to chapter 14 (hooks and automation) of claude-spine.

results.query: set up the starter hook set on this new MacBook — env-leak blocker, typecheck-after-edit, notify-on-long-completion
from now on, when I'm about to commit, block the commit if any test fails. Set that up.
I want Claude to auto-run `npm run typecheck` after every file edit in this Next.js repo — wire it up in settings.json
the test suite is hooking into a wrong port — fix the conflict
I added a PostToolUse hook to my settings.json but it's not firing — help me debug why
the deploy script keeps hooking on the broken DNS record — debug it
write a webhook handler for Stripe payment_intent.succeeded
React hooks: when does useEffect fire vs useLayoutEffect?
useState vs useReducer for a complex form — which one fits this case
should this 'always run prettier on saved files' rule be a hook, a CLAUDE.md instruction, or a skill? What's the right home?
